KeyManagerPolicy - Class in es.gob.fnmt.policy
Class to manage the policy user key selection.

KeyManagerPolicy.KeyUsage - Enum in es.gob.fnmt.policy
Gets a boolean array representing bits of KeyUsage ::= BIT STRING { digitalSignature (0), nonRepudiation (1), keyEncipherment (2), dataEncipherment (3), keyAgreement (4), keyCertSign (5), cRLSign (6), encipherOnly (7), decipherOnly (8) }
